query:
SELECT id, title, content INTO OUTFILE '/tmp/all_lessons.csv' 
FIELDS TERMINATED BY '|~|' 
ENCLOSED BY '"' 
LINES TERMINATED BY '\n' 
FROM lessons 
ORDER BY id;
